name: trae-cdp-http-bridge
description: Local HTTP bridge for Trae driven through Chrome DevTools Protocol and DOM automation.

scripts.test: node src/cdp/discovery.test.js && node src/cdp/dom-driver.test.js && node src/http/gateway.test.js
scripts.lint: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/cdp/errors.js && node --check src/cdp/browser-dom.js && node --check src/cdp/discovery.js && node --check src/cdp/discovery.test.js && node --check src/cdp/client.js && node --check src/cdp/dom-driver.js && node --check src/cdp/dom-driver.test.js && node --check src/cdp/mock-driver.js && node --check src/http/chat-ui.js && node --check src/http/gateway.js && node --check src/http/gateway.test.js && node --check scripts/start-trae.js && node --check scripts/start-gateway.js && node --check scripts/inspect-trae.js
scripts.typecheck: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/cdp/errors.js && node --check src/cdp/browser-dom.js && node --check src/cdp/discovery.js && node --check src/cdp/discovery.test.js && node --check src/cdp/client.js && node --check src/cdp/dom-driver.js && node --check src/cdp/dom-driver.test.js && node --check src/cdp/mock-driver.js && node --check src/http/chat-ui.js && node --check src/http/gateway.js && node --check src/http/gateway.test.js && node --check scripts/start-trae.js && node --check scripts/start-gateway.js && node --check scripts/inspect-trae.js
